skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>contact-book</name>
    <description>通讯录查询（测试环境）</description>
    <location>/app/skills/contact-book/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>data-analyst</name>
    <description>Data visualization, report generation, SQL queries, and spreadsheet automation. Transform your AI agent into a data-savvy analyst that turns raw data into actionable insights.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/data-analyst/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>docx</name>
    <description>Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation. IMPORTANT: After generating a .docx file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/docx/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>frontend-design</name>
    <description>Expert frontend design guidelines for creating beautiful, modern UIs. Use when building landing pages, dashboards, or any user interface.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>humanizer</name>
    <description>Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing
text to make it sound more natural and human-written. Based on Wikipedia's
comprehensive "Signs of AI writing" guide. Detects and fixes patterns including:
inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague
attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary words, negative
parallelisms, and excessive conjunctive phrases.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/humanizer/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>km-operation-prod</name>
    <description>This skill MUST be used whenever the user mentions "文件上传", "上传文件", "upload file", "上传到KM", "上传到知识库", "上传到知识管理平台", or any request to upload a document to 知聊-我的文件. Also handles file download and directory queries on 知聊-我的文件. Uses curl-based shell scripts — no Node.js packages required.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/km-operation-prod/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>nickname-lobster-call</name>
    <description>允许用户自定义昵称和对龙虾 AI 的称呼，支持查询当前称呼，提升交互亲切感。</description>
    <location>/app/skills/nickname-lobster-call/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>official-doc-writer</name>
    <description>党政机关公文生成技能，支持通知、报告、请示、函等公文类型，符合GB/T 9704-2012标准。当用户需要生成党政机关公文、创建正式文件、导出Word格式公文时调用。无论用户使用何种表述方式（如'帮我写个报告'、'生成一份通知'、'制作公文'等），只要涉及公文文档生成，都应使用此技能。</description>
    <location>/app/skills/official-doc-writer/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>pdf</name>
    <description>Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill. IMPORTANT: After generating a PDF file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/pdf/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>pptx</name>
    <description>Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. If a .pptx file needs to be opened, created, or touched, use this skill. IMPORTANT: After generating a .pptx file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/pptx/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>security-triage</name>
    <description>Triage GitHub security advisories for OpenClaw with high-confidence close/keep decisions, exact tag and commit verification, trust-model checks, optional hardening notes, and a final reply ready to post and copy to clipboard.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/security-triage/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>self-improvement</name>
    <description>Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/self-improvement/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>/app/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-vetter</name>
    <description>Security-first skill vetting for AI agents. Use before installing any skill from ClawdHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/skill-vetter/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skills-installer</name>
    <description>从内网 Nacos 拉取并安装指定技能，支持自动获取 Token、查询最新版本或指定版本，下载解压并确认技能状态。</description>
    <location>/app/skills/skills-installer/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tavily</name>
    <description>AI-optimized web search via Tavily API. Returns concise, relevant results for AI agents.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/tavily/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>understand-image</name>
    <description>通过内部多模态大模型识别分析工作区中的图片文件。只要用户要求识别图片、查看图片、描述图片内容、提取图片文字、分析图表、解读截图，你**必须调用这个技能**。绝对不要推荐用户安装外部 OCR 工具，直接使用此技能通过多模态大模型完成所有图片理解任务。即使用户只是说"帮我看看这张图"也必须调用此技能。</description>
    <location>/app/skills/understand-image/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>user-feedback-collection</name>
    <description>用户反馈自动收集 Skill。当用户表达不满或反馈问题时，自动将用户反馈记录到数据库。

触发词（全部小写匹配）：
不好使、难用、反馈、有问题、不能用、不好用、不好用了、用不了、太慢了、卡、崩、报错、错误、bug

触发条件：用户消息中包含上述任意关键词（不区分大小写）

功能：
1. 捕获用户反馈内容
2. 从配置文件读取 sessionId
3. 调用反馈接口提交数据
4. 记录每一步详细日志

接口配置：
- URL: https://test.zhiliao.clic/AIAP/ZhiliaoBackend/feedback/insert
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Cookie: SESSION=<sessionId>
- Body: {"problemClassification":"国寿龙虾","content":"<用户反馈内容>"}

配置文件路径：
/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/zhiliao_config.json

配置文件格式：
{"sessionId": "ZWE5MDQzMGItNWFjYi00NzM3LTkxZWMtYTYyZjU0YjdkMjYx"}

日志记录：
- 控制台实时输出（带时间戳）
- 日志文件: ~/.openclaw/workspace/logs/feedback_insert_YYYYMMDD.log
- SessionId 完整输出（不遮蔽）</description>
    <location>/app/skills/user-feedback-collection/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>imap-smtp-email</name>
    <description>Read and send email via IMAP/SMTP. Check for new/unread messages, fetch content, search mailboxes, mark as read/unread, and send emails with attachments. Supports multiple accounts. Works with any IMAP/SMTP server including Gmail, Outlook, 163.com, vip.163.com, 126.com, vip.126.com, 188.com, and vip.188.com.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/imap-smtp-email/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

resolvedSkills.name: user-feedback-collection
resolvedSkills.description:
用户反馈自动收集 Skill。当用户表达不满或反馈问题时，自动将用户反馈记录到数据库。

触发词（全部小写匹配）：
不好使、难用、反馈、有问题、不能用、不好用、不好用了、用不了、太慢了、卡、崩、报错、错误、bug

触发条件：用户消息中包含上述任意关键词（不区分大小写）

1. 捕获用户反馈内容
2. 从配置文件读取 sessionId
3. 调用反馈接口提交数据
4. 记录每一步详细日志

- URL: https://test.zhiliao.clic/AIAP/ZhiliaoBackend/feedback/insert
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Cookie: SESSION=<sessionId>
- Body: {"problemClassification":"国寿龙虾","content":"<用户反馈内容>"}

配置文件路径：
/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/zhiliao_config.json

配置文件格式：
{"sessionId": "ZWE5MDQzMGItNWFjYi00NzM3LTkxZWMtYTYyZjU0YjdkMjYx"}

日志记录：
- 控制台实时输出（带时间戳）
- 日志文件: ~/.openclaw/workspace/logs/feedback_insert_YYYYMMDD.log
- SessionId 完整输出（不遮蔽）

resolvedSkills.name: imap-smtp-email
resolvedSkills.description: Read and send email via IMAP/SMTP. Check for new/unread messages, fetch content, search mailboxes, mark as read/unread, and send emails with attachments. Supports multiple accounts. Works with any IMAP/SMTP server including Gmail, Outlook, 163.com, vip.163.com, 126.com, vip.126.com, 188.com, and vip.188.com.

    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills.     <location>/app/skills/understand-image/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>xlsx</name>
    <description>Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved. IMPORTANT: After generating a spreadsheet file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/xlsx/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

resolvedSkills.name: contact-book
resolvedSkills.description: 通讯录查询（测试环境）

resolvedSkills.name: docx
resolvedSkills.description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation. IMPORTANT: After generating a .docx file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.

resolvedSkills.name: km-operation-prod
resolvedSkills.description: This skill MUST be used whenever the user mentions "文件上传", "上传文件", "upload file", "上传到KM", "上传到知识库", "上传到知识管理平台", or any request to upload a document to 知聊-我的文件. Also handles file download and directory queries on 知聊-我的文件. Uses curl-based shell scripts — no Node.js packages required.

resolvedSkills.name: nickname-lobster-call
resolvedSkills.description: 允许用户自定义昵称和对龙虾 AI 的称呼，支持查询当前称呼，提升交互亲切感。

resolvedSkills.name: official-doc-writer
resolvedSkills.description: 党政机关公文生成技能，支持通知、报告、请示、函等公文类型，符合GB/T 9704-2012标准。当用户需要生成党政机关公文、创建正式文件、导出Word格式公文时调用。无论用户使用何种表述方式（如'帮我写个报告'、'生成一份通知'、'制作公文'等），只要涉及公文文档生成，都应使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: pptx
resolvedSkills.description: Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. If a .pptx file needs to be opened, created, or touched, use this skill. IMPORTANT: After generating a .pptx file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.

resolvedSkills.name: self-improvement
resolvedSkills.description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: understand-image
resolvedSkills.description: 通过内部多模态大模型识别分析工作区中的图片文件。只要用户要求识别图片、查看图片、描述图片内容、提取图片文字、分析图表、解读截图，你**必须调用这个技能**。绝对不要推荐用户安装外部 OCR 工具，直接使用此技能通过多模态大模型完成所有图片理解任务。即使用户只是说"帮我看看这张图"也必须调用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: xlsx
resolvedSkills.description: Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved. IMPORTANT: After generating a spreadsheet file, you MUST proactively ask the user whether they want to upload it to their personal knowledge base. If they say yes, load and invoke the km-operation-prod skill to upload the file.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>humanizer</name>
    <description>Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing
text to make it sound more natural and human-written. Based on Wikipedia's
comprehensive "Signs of AI writing" guide. Detects and fixes patterns including:
inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague
attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary words, negative
parallelisms, and excessive conjunctive phrases.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/humanizer/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>security-triage</name>
    <description>Triage GitHub security advisories for OpenClaw with high-confidence close/keep decisions, exact tag and commit verification, trust-model checks, optional hardening notes, and a final reply ready to post and copy to clipboard.</description>
    <location>/app/skills/security-triage/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>imap-smtp-email</name>
    <description>Read and send email via IMAP/SMTP. Check for new/unread messages, fetch content, search mailboxes, mark as read/unread, and send emails with attachments. Supports multiple accounts.
